title: Cozymon
description: A cobblemon pack that aims to encourage exploration as well as cool battles!
body:
![Pencil Fox Studios and Cozy Fox Den present... Cozymon! Featuring BeanCraft and the Supporters of Shackhorn Galaxy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a3a10fc5c4293df342cee1678c24fbf7c21adc9.png)
# Summary
A cobblemon modpack for my buddies and I, and perhaps for a public discord server, now on Modrinth! Encourages exploration, forging, and battling.
# Goals
The main purpose of Cozymon is to provide a way for friend groups who enjoy the idea of Cobblemon to come together and battle each other amidst basic survival needs!

While the modpack is mostly centered around Cobblemon, there are other quality-of-life features and technology-based mods that should make life as a Cobblemon trainer more interesting. For example...

## Create+
Starting off strong with Create and many Create addition mods, you can automate, build, and conveyor to heart's content! There are also railways to get around for all my fellow train enthusiasts out there. 👀

## Yung's Suite of Mods
Thanks to the Yung suite of mods, exploration is very interesting! Find dungeons, mineshafts, nether fortresses, and dessert temples that are sure to have nice loot.

## Ad Astra
Get ready to go to space with this mod! Be sure to leave your Cobblemon at home, though. Sorry. There wasn't a budget for cute lil' space suits that fit each one.

### and much, much more... how much more? Well...

# Mods
You can access a list of mods by going [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cozy-mon/version/latest) and scrolling down to see what's under **Dependencies**!

Have fun!
